# Copilot Instructions for HRK

## Build, test, and lint commands

### Backend (`backend/`)

- Install deps: `make install`
- Run API locally: `make run`
- Run all tests: `make test`
- Run a single test file: `PYTHONPATH=src poetry run pytest tests/test_health.py -v`
- Lint: `make lint`
- Format: `make format`
- Type-check: `make typecheck`
- Security scan: `make security`
- Full check pipeline: `make check`
- Apply migrations: `make migrate`
- Create migration: `make makemigration MSG="your message"`

### Frontend (`frontend/`)

- Install deps: `npm install`
- Run dev server: `npm run dev`
- Build: `npm run build`
- Lint: `npm run lint`
- Format: `npm run format`
- Format check: `npm run format:check`
- Sync OpenAPI types: `npm run types:sync`

## High-level architecture

- Monorepo with:
  - FastAPI backend (`backend/`)
  - React + TypeScript + Vite frontend (`frontend/`)
- Docker backend stack (`backend/docker-compose.yml`) runs:
  - PostgreSQL 17 + pgvector
  - MinIO (S3-compatible storage) + `minio-init` bucket bootstrap
  - FastAPI API
- Backend layering follows:
  - `API router -> Service -> Repository -> SQLAlchemy (AsyncSession)`
  - Business logic belongs in `service/`; persistence concerns in `repo/`.
- Backend config is centralized in `backend/src/app/config.py` via Pydantic settings; key values include `DATABASE_URL`, `DEBUG`, `API_V1_STR`, and S3/MinIO credentials.
- FastAPI OpenAPI/docs are debug-gated in `backend/src/app/main.py` (docs disabled when `DEBUG=false`).
- Frontend app bootstraps Redux + React Query + Router in `frontend/src/main.tsx`, uses a shared axios client with auth token interceptors (`frontend/src/lib/axios.ts`), and route composition in `frontend/src/App.tsx`.
- RAG direction (design docs):
  - `docs/rag-design.md`: Ollama (`nomic-embed-text` + `gemma4`), pgvector retrieval, OCR/chunk pipeline.
  - `docs/s3-security-design.md`: private bucket + SSE + presigned URLs.
  - `docs/ad-auth-design.md`: AD/Kerberos auto-login target and dev bypass strategy.

## Key conventions in this repository

- Backend uses `src/` layout; commands/tests assume `PYTHONPATH=src`.
- Keep backend flow layered: do not put direct SQLAlchemy access in service layer.
- After SQLAlchemy model changes, create and apply Alembic migrations (no manual schema edits).
- Keep API and frontend types in sync: after backend schema changes, run `npm run types:sync`.
- `frontend/src/types/api.ts` is generated by `types:sync`; do not hand-edit it.
- Frontend imports use alias `@/` mapped to `frontend/src`.
- No user self-registration is planned; authentication is AD-oriented (see `docs/ad-auth-design.md`).

## Project skill reference

- `/.github/skills/clean-code-principles.md` defines the reusable clean-code skill for this repository and should be applied proactively during implementation, refactors, and reviews.
